prompt:
Create a bold black and white social media poster with a surreal photography concept: an extreme close up of a human eye but the iris is replaced by a professional camera lens. Minimal white background, sharp skin texture, detailed eyelashes, realistic lens glass reflection, clean editorial layout, high fashion graphic design style, strong contrast, modern creative agency campaign aesthetic.

Main vertical text on right side: CONTENT SEES WHAT OTHERS SCROLL PAST. Top left text: POINT OF VIEW

Small paragraph text: In a world full of noise, attention belongs to the eye that sees meaning before everyone else. Creativity is not just looking, it is noticing.
Bottom small headline: CREATE THE ANGLE. OWN THE STORY. 

Ultraclean typography, bold condensed sans-serif, experimental layout, lots of negative space, premium Instagram poster design, 4:5 ratio, no logo, no watermark.
